functionalRequirements: Users must be able to see a list of their to-do items.
Users must be able to add a new to-do item to the list.
Users must be able to mark a to-do item as complete.
Completed items should appear visually different from incomplete items (e.g., with a line-through).
nonFunctionalRequirements: The interface should be clean, simple, and intuitive.
The application must be responsive and work on both desktop and mobile browsers.
userStories: As a user, I want to view all my tasks so that I can remember what I need to do.
As a user, I want to add a new task so that I can keep track of new work.
As a user, I want to mark a task as done so that I can see my progress.
